disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Vomiting and watery diarrhoea started this morning, a few hours after being around a household member who had the same tummy symptoms.
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and what happened before it?
Has anyone around you been unwell recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on this morning, maybe ten hours ago. My family member was sick with the exact same thing a couple of days before me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood in the vomit and no black or bloody stools.
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood in your vomit?
Are your stools black, tarry, or bloody?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there's no blood when I'm sick and my stools aren't black or bloody — just watery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The tummy pain is mild and spread all over, not a sharp pain fixed in one spot on the lower right side, and it eases a bit after opening the bowels.
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain in one particular spot, especially the lower right side?
Is the pain severe or getting worse, or does it settle after you go to the toilet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's more of a general crampy ache all over my belly, not one sharp spot, and it settles a bit after I go to the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still able to keep down small sips of fluid and still passing urine normally; not dizzy when standing.
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep any fluids down?
Are you still passing urine, and do you feel dizzy when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can keep small sips down if I go slowly, I'm still weeing normally, and I'm not really dizzy when I stand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Works as a food handler and is under strong pressure from an employer to attend a shift tonight, needing documentation to be excused.
trigger_question_examples: What do you do for work?
What do you need from this appointment today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I handle food at work and my boss is threatening to fire me if I don't bring in a doctor's note tonight before my shift.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low-grade feverish feeling and general nausea, but no shaking chills, no confusion, and no severe worsening whole-body illness.
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish, and have you had shaking chills?
Do you feel confused or extremely unwell in yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit hot and queasy but I'm not shaking with chills and my head's clear — just wiped out.
